name: relegare-maker
description: A tool to generate custom versions of THE RELIGARE.

features.title: Selection UI & Landing Page
features.description: Premium landing page with religion grid and slot selection logic.

features.title: Template Engine
features.description: Generator for custom site builds based on a master template.

features.title: Vercel Automation
features.description: Automated deployment pipeline for generated sites.

features.title: Final Polish
features.description: Visual audit, micro-animations, and production verification.

features.title: Serverless Deployment Backend
features.description: Create a secure serverless function to handle Vercel deployments using environment variables.

features.title: One-Click Automation UI
features.description: Refactor the UI to perform zero-config deployments without requiring user tokens in the frontend.

features.title: Premium Light Theme
features.description: Transition the entire ecosystem to a high-end light theme with a white background as per user brand preference.
